remaining_tasks.name: Fix Vercel TAVILY_API_KEY (or quota) — 1-min config fix in dashboard
Phase 4: Plan Canvas UI (5-tab render from Plan JSON)
Phase 5 LITE: Grounding (1 Tavily/Materials, no per-row, no URL verify)
Phase 7: Closed-Loop Corrections + Propagation (the moat moment — hard scope cut: Correct only)

blockers.summary: Production /api/qc returns {ok:"error", message:"Literature search service is unavailable", retryable:false} in ~1.3s. Direct Tavily probe with .env.local TAVILY_API_KEY (tvly-dev- prefix, 58 chars) returns HTTP 200 in ~500ms. Conclusion: Vercel's TAVILY_API_KEY env var is either stale, revoked, or different from .env.local. Possibly Tavily account quota exhausted.
blockers.fix: Open Vercel dashboard → sextant project → Settings → Environment Variables → compare TAVILY_API_KEY to .env.local value → update if mismatched → redeploy.
blockers.blocking: Phase 7 (closed loop), Phase 8 (cache warming + demo recording). Phase 4 + Phase 5 can proceed in parallel since they don't strictly need /api/plan working live (can test against fixture JSONs).

blockers.summary: /api/plan stops at exactly 60s without consolidator events or final data-plan part. 4 agents emit started+working but no done. Probably cascading from Tavily failure (Researcher hangs, others blocked behind 60s function ceiling). Should self-resolve once Tavily fix is in.
blockers.fix: Re-test /api/plan after Tavily fix lands. If still hits 60s with Tavily working, debug agent timeouts (D-66 says 35s/agent, 15s consolidator — fits 60s).

decisions.decision: Phase 7 hard cut: 'Correct' action only (no Challenge/Annotate), hard-coded rule-trigger fallback if extraction fails
decisions.rationale: Time pressure (was 5h, now ~3h to deadline). Approved by user.

decisions.decision: Phase 5 LITE scope: 1 Tavily call per Materials section (not per-row), no GROUND-05 URL verify
decisions.rationale: Time pressure. Approved by user. Honor CLAUDE.md hard rule #1 by marking ungrounded rows visibly, not faking citations.

decisions.decision: Phase 6 work shipped in parallel chat, not main chat
decisions.rationale: User approved parallel chat with handover doc. Phase 6 unblocked when trace.ts shipped in Wave 1 (commit 395a861).

decisions.decision: SEXTANT_DEMO_PACE_MS env var for demo recording slow-pacing
decisions.rationale: Cache-hit demo runs flash all agents done in <100ms. Server-side pacing in agent runners. Phase 6 also added client-side ?demoPace=slow URL param fallback.

next_action: /gsd-resume-work then either: (a) /gsd-plan-phase 4 --auto if Vercel fix is done, OR (b) ask user to fix Vercel TAVILY_API_KEY first (1 min in dashboard)
context_notes: Phase 3 + Phase 6 both code-complete. 78 commits pushed to origin/main this session (resolved a 24h backlog where main was 75 commits ahead of origin and Vercel was serving Phase 1 scaffold). Production now serves the new code BUT /api/qc returns retryable:false error in ~1.3s indicating Vercel TAVILY_API_KEY mismatch with .env.local (which works fine via direct probe). Tavily 4s→8s timeout fix shipped (commit d51c8aa) but is moot — actual issue is env var. Phases 4, 5 can plan/execute against fixture data without needing /api/plan live. Phase 7 + Phase 8 require working /api/plan.
production_state: DEPLOYED but TAVILY env var broken — /api/health 200, /api/qc returns error (Tavily auth issue), /api/plan accepts POST + streams agent events but never completes (cascading from Tavily failure)

session_summary: Big session: planned Phase 3 (3 plans/9 tasks/D-54..D-68), executed Wave 1+2+3 (Wave 3 hit auto-mode safety wall on UAT, finished inline), shipped Phase 6 in parallel chat, drafted full submission package (form fields + 2 video scripts + Mermaid diagram rendered), and resolved a critical 75-commit-backlog push to origin that was masking everything as 404. Final blocker is Vercel TAVILY_API_KEY config — 1 min user fix.
